subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is and others at Parsons home in Dublin, 1912-08-07
subcodes.first_line: We must first prove that there is no annihilation in creation.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول باید ثابت کنیم که از برای وجود فنائی نیست زیرا فنا عبارت از تفریق اجزاء مرکبه است
subcodes.subjects: @proofs for the existence; immortality of the soul, @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @relationship of the soul to the body, @martyrs and martyrdom
